title: Henry
html:
Henry — fall-2022 Corvallis/Beaverton boys-roster member. Recurs in Yahir's vault as a fantasy-football peer, a Nov-2022 inner-circle observer, and (notably) the named son of a billionaire who vouches for Yahir's character in a March-2023 dream — strongly suggesting the dream cast a real friend's name onto an archetype.

Mentions (chronological)

  • 2022 06 14 get josh allen — listed in the bonus-character draft pool for fantasy football alongside Nico, Hayden, Thien, Ian Cann, Luke's twin friends, MQuist, emilio
  • 2022 10 11 henry — note titled "Henry" with a 7-name roster dump; first-line-as-title pattern
  • 2022 11 20 thoughts on 112022 — surfaces as inner-circle observer at a Casey-hosted party alongside David and Rowan
  • 2023 03 26 just dreamt that i was one of the most pursued people in the — dream-Henry: a council led by "a billionaire and his son Henry" vouches for Yahir's character

Open questions

  • Last name? (Not in vault as of slice 3.)
  • Same-school as Yahir? (Likely OSU or Brogden-era.)
  • Why did the March-2023 dream pluck Henry's name specifically for the billionaire-son role? (Adjacent in the friend-group but not load-bearing in waking-life — exactly the kind of friend a dream casts as archetype-bearer.)
